title: Cheesy Baked Gnocchi
description: This super easy and delicious Cheesy Baked Gnocchi is a perfect weeknight meal for the whole family. With minimal prep and just one pan, it's a kid-friendly comfort food everyone will love.
instructions: In a large oven-safe skillet or baking dish, combine the gnocchi, marinara sauce, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Stir gently to combine.
Sprinkle 1 cup of mozzarella cheese over the gnocchi mixture.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the gnocchi is tender and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove from oven, sprinkle with the remaining 1 cup of mozzarella cheese and the Parmesan cheese. Return to oven for 5 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh basil before serving.
tips: For extra veggies, stir in a handful of spinach or finely diced zucchini with the marinara sauce.
If you don't have an oven-safe skillet, you can combine everything in a large bowl and then transfer to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving, as the cheese will be very hot.
